analysis.summary: The technician remotely accessed the client's desktop, logged in, and attempted to open an Excel file. Subsequently, they tried to launch Google Chrome, which resulted in a 'Run Error' message indicating a missing Snagit executable file. The session ended shortly after the error was dismissed, with no apparent resolution.
actions_taken: Logged into the Windows desktop as 'Neil Andersen'.
Attempted to open an Excel file named 'SAB_2396_...'.
Clicked 'OK' on an 'Agent Launch' window, possibly related to Cydexmation software.
Attempted to launch Google Chrome from the taskbar.
applications_used: Microsoft Excel (attempted to open a file)
issues_observed: Excel file did not visually open after being clicked (or opened off-screen).
An 'Agent Launch' window briefly appeared and disappeared.

A 'Run Error' occurred when attempting to launch Google Chrome, stating 'Cannot run command 'C:\users\NA\appdata\roaming\techsmith\snagit\2023\snagit.exe'' due to the file or folder not existing. This suggests an issue with Chrome's shortcut or an integration failure with Snagit.
notable_events: Encountered a 'Run Error' when launching Chrome, indicating a problem with a Snagit executable path.

idle_gaps: 00:09 - 00:16 (7 seconds): Cursor idle after attempting to open an Excel file.
00:19 - 00:33 (14 seconds): Cursor idle after dismissing the 'Agent Launch' window, before attempting to open Chrome.
00:38 - 00:44 (6 seconds): Cursor idle after dismissing the 'Run Error' until the end of the recording.
tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician performed limited actions, attempting to open two applications. One resulted in an error, which was acknowledged but not investigated or resolved within the captured session.
